name: Carrot Cake-5
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
2. Add the sugar to the dry ingredients and whisk until well combined.
3. Beat in the eggs, oil, grated carrots, crushed pineapple (with juice), and walnuts.
4. Pour the batter into a greased oblong baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely before frosting.
7. To make the frosting, beat together the softened cream cheese and butter until smooth.
8. Gradually add powdered sugar, mixing in any additional milk as desired.
9. Spread the frosting evenly over the cooled cake.
This recipe is a variation of carrot cake that can be made with less fat by substituting an equal amount of applesauce for some or all of the oil.
